summary: Open any file — even multi-gigabyte — and scroll / filter / derive / export it. Windowed, read-only over the source, offline.

filesystem.reads: user-opened files only (picker / drag-drop / a recent, which re-grants permission)
filesystem.writes: user-initiated export only, to a user-chosen path (OS Save dialog)
filesystem.local_state: block-index cache + an optional recents list (file handles + names) in IndexedDB — local only, never transmitted; reopening a recent re-grants permission (no silent re-read); clearable + disableable

host_needs.csp: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' blob:; style-src 'unsafe-inline'; img-src data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
